message:
fix: block BD_BACKEND env var to prevent data fragmentation (bd-hevyw)

Viper AutomaticEnv with BD_ prefix could let users accidentally
override the storage backend, writing to sqlite while dolt is active.
The backend is authoritative from .beads/metadata.json; env var
overrides are now detected and rejected with a clear error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
